name: humanize
description: Use this skill when the user wants to remove AI-generated writing patterns from text, make copy sound more natural and human-written, or edit content that reads like it was written by ChatGPT. Also use when the user says 'this sounds like AI,' 'too robotic,' 'AI slop,' 'make this sound human,' 'sounds like ChatGPT,' or 'remove AI patterns.' Detects and fixes 24 patterns including significance inflation, promotional language, superficial -ing analyses, vague attributions, AI vocabulary words, and
author: whawkinsiv
